summary.lv: Ubiquiti meklē IT Product Manager ar tehnisko izstrādes pieredzi, kurš vadīs produkta virzienu sadarbībā ar inženieriem un nodrošinās kvalitatīvu risinājumu piegādi.
summary.en: Ubiquiti is looking for an IT Product Manager with a software development background to drive technical product direction in collaboration with engineering teams and ensure high-quality delivery.
